testsuite.name: findZombieTasksByUserId — 좀비 태스크 감지

testcase.name: 정상 케이스: delayCount >= 5 이고 PENDING인 Task만 반환

testsuite.system-out: 2026-05-19T12:50:20.840+09:00 INFO 16165 --- [ Test worker] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.teamsigma.taskmanager.repository.TaskRepositoryTest$ZombieTaskTest]: ZombieTaskTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-05-19T12:50:20.842+09:00 INFO 16165 --- [ Test worker] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.teamsigma.taskmanager.TaskManagerApplication for test class com.teamsigma.taskmanager.repository.TaskRepositoryTest$ZombieTaskTest Hibernate: insert into users (email,nickname,id) values (?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: update tasks set deadline=?,delay_count=?,description=?,estimated_minutes=?,importance=?,required_energy=?,status=?,title=?,updated_at=?,user_id=? where id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.created_at,t1_0.deadline,t1_0.delay_count,t1_0.description,t1_0.estimated_minutes,t1_0.importance,t1_0.required_energy,t1_0.status,t1_0.title,t1_0.updated_at,t1_0.user_id from tasks t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and t1_0.status='SNOOZED' and t1_0.delay_count>=5 order by t1_0.delay_count desc Hibernate: insert into users (email,nickname,id) values (?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: update tasks set deadline=?,delay_count=?,description=?,estimated_minutes=?,importance=?,required_energy=?,status=?,title=?,updated_at=?,user_id=? where id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.created_at,t1_0.deadline,t1_0.delay_count,t1_0.description,t1_0.estimated_minutes,t1_0.importance,t1_0.required_energy,t1_0.status,t1_0.title,t1_0.updated_at,t1_0.user_id from tasks t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and t1_0.status='SNOOZED' and t1_0.delay_count>=5 order by t1_0.delay_count desc Hibernate: insert into users (email,nickname,id) values (?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: update tasks set deadline=?,delay_count=?,description=?,estimated_minutes=?,importance=?,required_energy=?,status=?,title=?,updated_at=?,user_id=? where id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.created_at,t1_0.deadline,t1_0.delay_count,t1_0.description,t1_0.estimated_minutes,t1_0.importance,t1_0.required_energy,t1_0.status,t1_0.title,t1_0.updated_at,t1_0.user_id from tasks t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and t1_0.status='SNOOZED' and t1_0.delay_count>=5 order by t1_0.delay_count desc
